summary: Iteration 21 audit fixes verified end-to-end. 15/15 backend tests pass. P0 bugs 1-3 fixed. Metric-Action Contract, Re-Order close-the-loop workflow, and WhatChangedBelt endpoint all working. Clean auth flow, no Mongo _id leakage, KES currency consistent.
verified_features: P0 Bug 1 — /api/customers avg_customer_spend recomputed: 75,303,690 / 6,748 = 11,159.41 (not 116k+). Source flag = 'recomputed_local'. Fallback flag 'upstream_unverified' exists in code path.
P0 Bug 2 — CEO Report Sales/Visitor column shows real KES values (1,031 / 709 / 893 / 1,514 / 1,682). Zero 'KES 0' instances in footfall table.
P0 Bug 3 — Churn tiles: short window (This Month 24d) shows only 'churn-not-applicable' tile; long window (This Year >90d) shows both 'kpi-churned-count' (2,947) and 'kpi-churn' (12.20%), N/A hidden.

Metric-Action Contract — All 8 Overview KPIs (kpi-total-sales/net-sales/orders/units/rr/returns/footfall/conversion) expose data-testid suffix '-action'. 'See by location' on Total Sales navigates to /locations. Tab+Enter keyboard nav works.

Re-Order workflow — 50 pending pills render. 'Change' → 'Mark PO raised' flips pill, hides row (50→49), 'Show resolved (1)' toggle appears, toggles back (49→50). State persists after reload (row hidden by default).

WhatChangedBelt — Backend /api/user/last-visit shape is correct; returns 401 without auth. Belt correctly absent on /overview when is_warm_return=false (fresh session, as expected by spec — belt is decorative, fetch failure does not break overview).
GET /api/recommendations requires auth (401). Full CRUD flow validated: POST po_raised → GET confirms → POST pending deletes → GET confirms absent. Invalid status returns 422. Bulk DELETE works.
Regression — /api/kpis, /api/sales-summary, /api/leaderboard/streaks, /api/footfall, /api/ibt-suggestions all 200 OK. Login works. No _id leakage.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 2162 lines — approaching maintainability concerns; consider splitting by domain (customers, kpis, leaderboard) in a future refactor.
recommendation_state collection lacks TTL — stale dismissed/done rows will accumulate. Consider adding a TTL index (e.g., 180 days on updated_at) or a scheduled cleanup.
last-visit endpoint uses a 30-day warm-return window upper bound; consider exposing this as env-configurable.
seed_data_creation: No permanent seed. Transient rows under user_id during recommendation test were cleaned up via DELETE /api/recommendations?item_type=reorder and ?item_type=ibt.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 21 audit-driven P0 fixes all pass. WhatChangedBelt is absent on overview for fresh logins because is_warm_return=false (user just authed, no prior activity >10 min old). To test the positive belt rendering, seed activity_logs with ts=now-30h BEFORE login, or log in once, wait 10+ min, re-open the page. Do NOT expect the belt on a fresh login + immediate visit. Re-Order rows with status 'po_raised' are hidden by default; use 'Show resolved (N)' toggle to view them. Backend returns 365d churn of 35,167 with source=upstream_90d_cached — frontend correctly gates display by window length (<90d ⇒ N/A tile, ≥90d ⇒ real tiles).
rca of the issue: None — all verified features working as specified.
